data.title: Mallinckrodt, Endo Merger To Create Pharma Entity Valued At $7 Billion
data.description: Mallinckrodt and Endo are merging in a $6.7 billion deal, with a pro forma NYSE listing and $900 million in financing.

data.title: Demystifying Webster Financial: Insights From 5 Analyst Reviews
Pfizer's Direct-To-Consumer Model Faces Scrutiny From US Senators
data.description: Senators question Pfizer's partnership with UpScriptHealth, citing potential anti-kickback concerns and risks of increased costs in federal health programs.

data.title: ZIM Integrated Shipping Services Generated Strong Cash Flows In 2024: Analyst
data.description: ZIM Integrated Shipping Services' stock tanked despite Q4 results. The analyst maintains hold rating, cites cash position and cost structure.

data.title: Wall Street's Downward Slide Returns, Gold Breaks Records, Intel Skyrockets On CEO Appointment: What's Driving Markets Thursday?
data.description: Bears regained control on Wall Street, with major indices wiping out Wednesday's gains and retesting recent lows as investor concerns over tariffs continue to weigh on sentiment.
